しかし、このハーブティー、いったい何だったんだ？: But what was that herbal tea, anyway?
ルディア様から頂いたものだったのですが、何かの手違いなのでしょう。<br>危険で:
I received it from Lady Ludia, so it must have been some kind of
mistake. Since it is dangerous, I will dispose of all of it.
身だしなみを整え、自分が汚した床もキッチリと掃除し終えたニナは、<br>いつもの:
Having tidied herself up and thoroughly cleaned the floor she'd
soiled, Nina answered with her usual cool expression.
ルディアからか……。<br>なるほど、あいつ怪しい媚薬入りアイテムとか色々揃えて:
From Ludia, huh... That figures. She's got all sorts of suspicious
aphrodisiac stuff...
今後は、御主人様にお出しする前に事前にわたくしが試飲しないと駄目ですね。<br>:
From now on, I will have to taste-test anything before serving it to
you, Master. If someone had poisoned it, it would be dangerous.
いやいや、それじゃニナの身体が危険だろ。<br>そんな毒見役みたいなことまでしな:
No, no, that would put you in danger, Nina. You don't have to go as
far as being a poison taster.
そう言いながら、<br>媚薬入りのハーブティーを飲んで淫らな姿になったニナを少し:
Even as I say that, I can't help but briefly picture Nina's lewd state
after drinking the aphrodisiac herbal tea.
ハーブティーの葉の入った缶をゴミ箱に入れようとした手を止めるニナ。<br>何かに:
Nina stopped her hand just as she was about to throw the can of
herbal tea leaves into the trash. She seemed to have noticed something.
ん？ なんだ？ 何か気が付いたことでもあるのか？: Hm? What is it? Did you notice something?
あ、い、いえ、別に……<br>た、多分、ルディア様が間違えて渡しただけかと……:
Ah, n-no, nothing... It's, um, p-probably just that Lady Ludia handed it
to me by mistake...
いつも冷静なニナが珍しく動揺を見せる。: Nina, usually so composed, was unusually flustered.
（ひょっとして、わたくしが御主人様との距離が<br>中々縮まらないことをルディア:
(Could it be because I consulted Lady Ludia about how the distance
between Master and me is not narrowing?)
（だとしたら、ルディア様はルディア様で悪戯が過ぎますよ……<br>あのハーブティ:
(If that is the case, Lady Ludia is being too mischievous... Because of
that herbal tea, I might have... with Master...)
なぁ、何か隠してるだろ？ 顔が赤いぞ。: Hey, you're hiding something, aren't you? Your face is all red.
な、何も隠してなどいません！ ほ、本日はこれで失礼します！: I-I am not hiding anything! I-I shall take my leave for today!
ニナはそう言って軽くお辞儀をすると、<br>逃げるように司令室から出ていってしま:
Saying that, Nina gave a slight bow and fled from the command room
as if escaping.
